response.justification: The candidate is a solid senior full-stack engineer with ~14 years of experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators), but falls well short of a Principal/Director-level IC bar. There is no evidence of director-level technical leadership, no recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms, no advanced degree in an AI field, and no track record of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud/AI strategy at scale.
strengths: Broad full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent tooling and MCP frameworks
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial initiative
concerns: No demonstrated AI products, ML expertise, or recognized AI thought leadership
Career trajectory is senior IC, not director-level / Principal engineering leadership
Limited large-scale cloud strategy or strategic customer advisory experience

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise / shipped AI platforms
Seniority gap vs. Principal/Director IC bar
